avr-gcc -mmcu=atxmega128a3u -DF_CPU=32000000UL -Os -Wall -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/FAT32.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/SD_routines.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/awire_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/console.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/fonts.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/jtag_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/kb_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/lcd_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/main.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/mcu_dirver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/ningen_ui.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/nvm_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/programs.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/ram_driver.c.o CMakeFiles/MINICOM4.elf.dir/src/strings.c.o -o MINICOM4.elf
